calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Feb-27-2019 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Feb-20-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: John Braun for Administrator.

Mr. Braun stated that the property was appraised by the Probate Referee at $1,200,000.00, that it sold for $1,410,000.00, that getting another appraiser saved them $30,000.00 in capital gains tax, and that the Brothers agreed to have George appointed and have his Wife assist with all of the things needed to get the house sold. Mr. Braun also stated that the $7,500.00 in travel expenses was mostly for airfare, that George and his Wife mostly came together, that she came alone once, that there was a hoarding issue, that the Wife cleaned the house and dealt with the banks, that they did a lot and made repeated visits, that they did not stay at expensive hotels and that these were very modest expenses. In addition, Mr. Braun stated that the kept the AT&T phone because they were hoping that someone would call and provide information on the Decedent, and that they changed over to sonic so that they could have access to the internet to find people to help with the clean up. The Petition for Final Distribution, etc. is under submission.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.

Lynn Chalut (non-party; Petitioner's Spouse)

Mr. Wong stated the decedent's (his sister) predeceased husband's name was Warren Wong. Ms. Chalut stated that Warren Wong passed away on December 8, 2009. The court granted the Petition for Letters of Administration (subject to review of the order) . Bond in the amount of $753,000 is required. Status on filing of the Inventory and Appraisal is set for June 27, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Status on close of estate is set for February 27, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera, Shirley Le. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.
